---
title: "Research"
---

We are committed pushing the frontier of gravitational-wave astronomy across the spectrum—combining space-based LISA observations with nanohertz pulsar
timing array science, developing innovative analysis techniques across these complementary observational domains, and building a comprehensive understanding
of gravitational wave sources across cosmic history.



## LISA space mission
The Laser Interferometer Space Antenna (LISA) mission is a next-generation space observatory designed to detect gravitational waves from massive cosmic events across the universe.
Using three spacecraft separated by millions of kilometers, LISA will measure tiny distortions in spacetime with unprecedented precision.
Led by the European Space Agency in collaboration with NASA, the mission will open a new window into black holes, galaxy formation, and fundamental physics.
